dialogos.texto_en: Huh?! They're not here!
How's it look, Yotsuba?
Not good. I completely lost sight of them!
Uwaa, we let our guard down.
We didn't even notice when they disappeared.
Huff... Huff...\nWh-where could they have gone...
We were supposed to go from Ocean Expo Park\nto American Village tomorrow, right?
Yeah.\nYou'd think those two would stick to the plan.
Where to next?
Well, they were supposed to be here until evening...\nSo, I let my guard down.
That means they got ahead of us, huh.
Itsuki must have seen my ribbon\nat Churaumi Aquarium, after all?!\nSooorry!
If she had noticed it then,\nshe would've called us out sooner.
Should we keep looking for her a bit more?\nMaybe she went into a shop somewhere.
...I think that's enough for now.
You think?
Fu-kun and Itsuki seemed like their usual selves,\nso I don't think she'll be crying anymore.
Yeah.\nFutaro and Itsuki are both okay now.
Well, let's call off the stakeout here.\nFrom now on, let's all do our own thing.
Yeah, we don't want to be a bother.
*sigh* Come to think of it,\nfollowing her all the way here, aren't we being\ntoo overprotective of our little sister?
YOU'RE saying that, Nino?\nYou were the one who seemed most worried.
No, I wasn't!
I'm sorry, Raiha-chan.\nWe made you come along with us.
No, I was curious too.\nAnd besides%p-2;――
Everyone is so sweet to their little sister,\njust like how my big bro is!
Ahaha...\nSo clearly spoken.
We are pretty sweet to her, but%p-2;――
We can't deny that.
Nope.
